bead.title: Stage 2.13: GraphQL integration test suite (queries + mutations + subscriptions)
bead.description: New file cli/internal/server/graphql/integration_test.go. Uses t.TempDir() + real bead store + real git. ZERO MOCKS per DDx testing doctrine. Must cover: every Query resolver, every Mutation resolver, at least one Subscription test that drives a real WebSocket client. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 2 bead #26.
bead.acceptance: (1) `go test ./cli/internal/server/graphql/... -count=1 -v` passes with all three test categories present (query, mutation, subscription). (2) Zero mocks in the test file (grep for 'mock' or 'Mock' returns nothing). (3) Test file uses t.TempDir() + bead.NewStore + real git init. (4) All Stage 2 resolvers have at least one test each.
